productName: Super Fog - Fire - Ion - 1g (1pk) - Blueberry Space Cake - IND - Sweet
description: A indica vape cartridge filled with Blueberry Space Cake oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — with notes of blueberry, berry, and butter, with settle-in, melt-into-the-couch ease.
